❀ - Sooo.... As you noticed, i love fluff. I've got that idea and i reeeally wanted to do that goofy Jabber bot. Hope ya'll like it!

❀ - I plan to post bots more often in Jenuary and i think of making Semiu bot soon. I'm thinking about different scenarious, so hope i'll make one soon. Happy new year, tho (⁠◕⁠ᴗ⁠◕⁠✿⁠)
